[210:23]from the entire 12 day war and how it ended,

[210:26]to put it succinctly, is that we are right back

[210:30]where we started.

[210:32]The war, the US attack on Iran,

[210:35]it did not fundamentally change anything about the situation.

[210:41]As I said on Monday, Tuesday,

[210:44]the situation before the war was this.

[210:47]Israel was seeking regime change in Iran.

[210:58]program.

[211:19]deal rather than a war.

[211:37]in the Middle East.

[211:46]This is reported separately by the state of Israel, by the government of Iran, by US intelligence,

[211:53]by the governments of the E3 countries, and by the IAEA director.

[212:10]stockpile of enriched uranium, which is really the chief concern, that would be the fuel for

[212:16]a potential Iranian nuclear bomb.

[212:43]significantly degraded their ballistic missile capability,

[212:47]and they did damage some of their nuclear facilities.

[212:54]has not changed and has not been affected.

[213:02]we're going to point to what happens next.

[213:11]this is something I said on Saturday, we have now learned with some confidence the extent

[213:17]and the results of the strike on Saturday.

[213:26]nuclear program at the behest of Israel.

[213:29]We flew B2 stealth bombers from Missouri.

[213:33]They did this fake out.

[213:34]Some flew west and they were on radar and others flew east with their stealth capabilities

[213:40]on.

[213:41]They drop bunker buster bombs.

[213:43]These are 30,000 pound bombs, serious conventional ordinance.

[214:58]and infrastructure, and so that they have come that far and created that much material,

[216:45]They're so heavy and they're dropped from so high that they pierce the ground and they

[217:01]They're not like other bombs that detonate right before hitting the ground or hitting

[217:06]the ground on impact.

[217:10]That it's the kinetic energy, the force, the weight of the bomb, that they're 30,000 pounds.
